reasoning: The Wikipedia page 'List of infectious diseases' currently features an empty cell (which counts as 'No' according to the criteria) for Clostridioides difficile colitis under the Vaccine(s) column. A review published in PubMed in May 2025 explicitly states that there is currently no approved vaccine on the market for C. difficile. Pfizer's Phase 3 CLOVER trial for its vaccine candidate failed its primary endpoint in 2022 and there is no indication that any company has submitted a Biologics License Application (BLA) for a C. difficile vaccine. Given the standard ~10 month FDA review time, it is virtually impossible for a vaccine to be approved and added to Wikipedia by March 2026. The only pathway to a 'Yes' resolution would be persistent Wikipedia vandalism, which is highly unlikely. Therefore, the probabilities are set to the minimum allowable bounds, slightly increasing over time due to general uncertainty.
